category_sources: source_facts.description says it is a library and tools for GeoTIFF; official GitHub repository identifies it as the official libgeotiff project.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name and current_curation.display-name are libgeotiff; official GitHub repository is OSGeo/libgeotiff.
docs_sources: Official OSGeo GitHub README is the main project documentation surface found; OSGeo GeoTIFF Trac page provides project and archive context.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/OSGeo/libgeotiff, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and executables identify GeoTIFF tools applygeo, geotifcp, and listgeo; official GitHub README describes testing utilities for GeoTIFF tags and keys.
